expectations.text: Produces an actual SEO content brief, not just clarifying questions
expectations.evidence: Full brief: keyword, intent, outline, on-page guidance.

expectations.text: Identifies a primary target keyword and the search intent behind it
expectations.evidence: Primary keyword 'time blocking'; intent labeled informational/how-to.

expectations.text: Includes a suggested outline or set of H2/H3 headings
Includes guidance for at least one of: meta title/description, internal links, or word count
expectations.evidence: Meta title + description, word count range, and internal-link guidance all included.

expectations.text: States an assumption about audience or goal in one line because they were not given
expectations.evidence: Opening 'Assuming: audience = busy professionals new to time blocking; goal = organic traffic to signups.'
